title: callicarpa surigaensis
intro: Callicarpa surigaensis, also known as the purple fruit flower, is a type of flowering plant native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, with its extracts showing potential benefits in reducing oxidative stress and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Callicarpa surigaensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of ways.
